name: Key Lime Cake-Cnn on the Menu
recipeIngredient: 2 eggs, room temperature and lightly beaten
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Brush the inside of an 8-inch bundt pan or a 9-inch springform tube pan with butter, oil, or non-stick cooking spray. Set aside.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter until softened and well blended. Gradually add sugar and beat until well combined. Gradually beat in eggs. Beat in lime zest and juice.
5. Alternately stir the dry ingredients and buttermilk into the mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 35-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Loosen edges with a knife and invert onto a wire rack set over a plate.
7. To make syrup, whisk together confectioner's sugar and lime juice in a small bowl. While the cake is still warm, poke holes using a skewer, cake tester, or fork. Slowly spoon the lime syrup over the cake. The cake can be made ahead and kept covered in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
